_note: Reference baselines for eliza-1 tiers vs. the closest published Qwen2.5-VL / Qwen3-VL numbers. Eliza-1 tiers are derived from the corresponding Qwen base, so we report the Qwen baseline at each size as the comparison target. The HF model-card pipeline (Task 11) reads the per-run report from results/<tier>-<benchmark>-<date>.json and joins against this file by `${tier}::${benchmark}`.
